query:
INSERT INTO orders (
  establishmentId, 
  orderNumber, 
  customerName, 
  customerPhone, 
  customerAddress, 
  status, 
  deliveryType, 
  paymentMethod, 
  subtotal, 
  deliveryFee, 
  discount, 
  total, 
  notes, 
  changeAmount,
  source, 
  externalId, 
  externalDisplayId, 
  externalStatus, 
  externalData,
  createdAt
) VALUES (
  30001,
  '#IFOOD-TEST-001',
  'João Silva (Teste iFood)',
  '11999887766',
  'Rua das Flores, 123 - Centro - São Paulo/SP',
  'new',
  'delivery',
  'card',
  '85.00',
  '8.00',
  '10.00',
  '83.00',
  'Pedido de teste para validar informações do iFood',
  NULL,
  'ifood',
  'ifood-test-uuid-12345',
  '#1234',
  'PLACED',
  '{"orderTiming": "SCHEDULED", "schedule": {"deliveryDateTimeStart": "2026-02-02T18:00:00Z", "deliveryDateTimeEnd": "2026-02-02T18:30:00Z"}, "customer": {"documentNumber": "123.456.789-00", "name": "João Silva"}, "payments": {"methods": [{"method": "CREDIT", "card": {"brand": "MASTERCARD"}, "value": 8300}]}, "total": {"orderAmount": 8300, "benefits": [{"value": 1000, "sponsorshipValues": {"IFOOD": 1000}}]}, "delivery": {"observations": "Apartamento 42, interfone 1234. Deixar na portaria se não atender."}}',
  NOW()
);
